name: 09_mix_qualifying_and_skipped
description: Mixed holdings: some qualify, some skipped via either (a) ticker absent from live_vwaps or (b) v <= 0. Only the qualifying ones contribute.
derivation: AAPL: in live_vwaps, v=100>0 -> contributes alloc*(p-v)/v = 0.4*(110-100)/100 = 0.4*0.10 = 0.04; weight += 0.4. TSLA: NOT in live_vwaps -> skipped entirely (0 to both). SPY: in live_vwaps but v=0.0, fails `v > 0` -> skipped (0 to both). QQQ: in live_vwaps, v=50>0 -> contributes alloc*(p-v)/v = 0.1*(50-50)/50 = 0.1*0.0 = 0.0; weight += 0.1. Sum diff: 0.04 + 0.0 = 0.04. Sum weight: 0.4 + 0.1 = 0.5. Final: (0.04, 0.5).
